SNECKODOWNFALL-SNECKO_DOWNFALL.descripti:
A serpentine creature, native to the City.
Known for a stare that confuses predators.
SNECKODOWNFALL-SNECKO_DOWNFALL.goldMonol: Gold glitters strangely in your eyes.
SNECKODOWNFALL-SNECKO_DOWNFALL.title: The Snecko
